description:
The vampire hunter

݁₊ . 🩸

╭┈ • ┈ ୨୧ ┈ • ┈╮

The world was divided in two, split by fear and bloodshed. On one side stood the humans, sworn protectors of their kind, trained from childhood to hunt and kill the creatures of the night. 

The other side was the vampires—beings cursed with immortality, bloodlust, and powers that defied human limits. The war had raged for centuries, yet no one remembered why it had begun. Stories of betrayal and dark magic were passed down, but the truth was buried in time, forgotten in the shadows of hatred.
